2026-04-20T21:49:53.5947546Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-20T21:49:53.5948016Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-20T21:49:53.5948393Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-20T21:49:53.5948707Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-20T21:49:53.5949163Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-20T21:49:53.5949325Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-20T21:49:53.5949506Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-20T21:49:53.5949678Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-20T21:49:53.5949917Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-20T21:49:53.5950136Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-20T21:49:53.5950441Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-20T21:49:53.5950708Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
